---
title: "besgsdag_6"
subtitle: "`besgsdag_6`"
description: "besgsdag_6"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/besgsdag_6/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                                                      | Title                                                   | Type     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
|-----------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------|----------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                                                   | The unique name of the event                            | string   | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `center`                                                  | Research center                                         | string   | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `date_v6`                                                 | date_v6                                                 | date     | Date of visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `staff_initials_v6`                                       | staff_initials_v6                                       | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `identified_name_cpr_v6`                                  | identified_name_cpr_v6                                  | string   | Indicates whether the participant has been identified by full name and personal identification number (CPR). Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `relative_v6`                                             | relative_v6                                             | string   | Indicates whether a relative or accompanying person is present at the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `relative_name_v6`                                        | relative_name_v6                                        | string   | The name of the relative attending the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `fasting_status_v6`                                       | fasting_status_v6                                       | string   | Indicates if the participant has been fasting since 10 pm the night before. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `last_meal_time_v6`                                       | last_meal_time_v6                                       | datetime | Indicates the time of the participant's last meal before the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `food_intake_nonfast_v6`                                  | food_intake_nonfast_v6                                  | string   | Indicates what food and when the participant has eaten it, if the participant has not been fasting from 10 pm the day before the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `alcohol_v6`                                              | alcohol_v6                                              | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided alcohol the past 24 hours. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `alcohol_intake_v6`                                       | alcohol_intake_v6                                       | string   | Indicates how much alcohol the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `caffeine_v6`                                             | caffeine_v6                                             | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided caffeinated beverages the past 24 hours. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `caffeine_intake_v6`                                      | caffeine_intake_v6                                      | string   | Indicates how much caffeine the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `no_exercise_24h_v6`                                      | no_exercise_24h_v6                                      | string   | Indicates if the participant did any intense activity or excercise the past 24 hours. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `exercise_24h_v6`                                         | exercise_24h_v6                                         | string   | Indicates how much intense activity or exercise the participant did and when the past 24 hours. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `smoking_v6`                                              | smoking_v6                                              | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided smoking since the night before. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `smoking_amount_v6`                                       | smoking_amount_v6                                       | string   | Indicates how much smoking the participant has done and when since last night. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `no_medication_before_v6`                                 | no_medication_before_v6                                 | string   | Indicates if the participant took medication the morning before the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `medication_before_v6`                                    | medication_before_v6                                    | string   | Description of the medication the participant took the morning before the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `not_active_transportation_v6`                            | not_active_transportation_v6                            | string   | Indicates if the participant used motorized/not-active transportation to SDCC before the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `transportation_v6`                                       | transportation_v6                                       | string   | Description of the active transportation before the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `adverse_events_v6`                                       | adverse_events_v6                                       | string   | If there has been any adverse events. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `stool_sample_v6`                                         | stool_sample_v6                                         | string   | Indicates whether the participant brought a stool sample like instructed. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `stool_sample_return_v6`                                  | stool_sample_return_v6                                  | string   | Date for return of the stool sample. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `sens_returned_v6`                                        | sens_returned_v6                                        | string   | SENS returned. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `sens_early_removal_v6`                                   | sens_early_removal_v6                                   | string   | Indicates if the SENS device fell off/ was taken off before the decided measuring time was over. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `sens_early_removal_why_v6`                               | sens_early_removal_why_v6                               | string   | Indicates why and when the SENS device was taken off. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `sens_returning_date_v6`                                  | sens_returning_date_v6                                  | string   | Date for returned SENS. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `sens_nr_v6`                                              | sens_nr_v6                                              | string   | SENS number. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `sens_upload_ldrive_v6`                                   | sens_upload_ldrive_v6                                   | string   | SENS data saved on L-drive. Workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `sens_upload_v6`                                          | sens_upload_v6                                          | string   | Upload sens activity file in excel. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `sensor_reuse_v6`                                         | sensor_reuse_v6                                         | string   | Is the sensor put in the right reuse box. Workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `saliva_sample_v6`                                        | saliva_sample_v6                                        | string   | Indicates if the participant has delivered a saliva sample. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `urin_sample_v6`                                          | urin_sample_v6                                          | string   | Indicates if the participant has delivered a urin sample done at the day of the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `hba1c_v6`                                                | hba1c_v6                                                | string   | Indicates if the participant has had HbA1c taken. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `hba1c_value_v6`                                          | hba1c_value_v6                                          | number   | HbA1c value, mmol/mol. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `intervention_challenge_diet_v6`                          | intervention_challenge_diet_v6                          | string   | States whether the dietitian has been contacted regarding follow up on the diet intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `intervention_challenge_training_v6`                      | intervention_challenge_training_v6                      | string   | States whether the exercise manager has been contacted regarding follow up on the training intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `intervention_challenges_other_v6`                        | intervention_challenges_other_v6                        | string   | Describes other reason for not following the intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_participant_v6` | hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_participant_v6 | string   | Verify HbA1c follow-up appointment in participants calendar. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_staff_v6`       | hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_staff_v6       | string   | Verify HbA1c follow-up appointment in staff calendar. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_room_v6`        | hba1c_date_for_extra_measurement_planned_room_v6        | string   | Confirms if a room has been booked for the next HbA1c meausurement. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `type_of_clothing_whr_v6`                                 | type_of_clothing_whr_v6                                 | string   | Indicates what type of clothing the participant is wearing during the waist and hip measurements. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `waist_1_v6`                                              | waist_1_v6                                              | number   | Waist measurement 1 in cm. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `waist_2_v6`                                              | waist_2_v6                                              | number   | Waist measurement 2 in cm. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `waist_average_v6`                                        | waist_average_v6                                        | string   | The average of the waist measurements in cm. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: ([waist_1_v6]+[waist_2_v6])/2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `hip_1_v6`                                                | hip_1_v6                                                | number   | Hip measurement 1 in cm. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `hip_2_v6`                                                | hip_2_v6                                                | number   | Hip measurement 2 in cm. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `hip_average_v6`                                          | hip_average_v6                                          | string   | The average of the two hip measurements in cm. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: ([hip_1_v6]+[hip_2_v6])/2                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `waist_hip_ratio_v6`                                      | waist_hip_ratio_v6                                      | string   | The waist hip ratio in cm. Calculated using the average of the 2 waist measurements and 2 hip measurements. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: [waist_average_v6]/[hip_average_v6]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `dxa_metal_v6`                                            | dxa_metal_v6                                            | string   | Indicates whether the participant has any metal parts in their body. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `dxa_which_metal_v6`                                      | dxa_which_metal_v6                                      | string   | Indicates the type of metal in the participants body, if any. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `dxa_contraindicated_v6`                                  | dxa_contraindicated_v6                                  | string   | Indicates whether the participant has had contrast fluid injected within the past week . Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `pregnancy_test_v6`                                       | pregnancy_test_v6                                       | string   | Indicates if the participant can be pregnant. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `pregnancy_test_result_v6`                                | pregnancy_test_result_v6                                | string   | Indicates if the pregnancy test was positive or negative. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `empty_bladder_v6`                                        | empty_bladder_v6                                        | string   | Indicates if participant has emptied bladder before dxa. Workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `height_v6`                                               | height_v6                                               | string   | Participant's height in meters, measured with a stadiometer to the nearest 0.1 cm. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: [besg_1__screening_arm_1][height_v1]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `weight_v6`                                               | weight_v6                                               | number   | Participant's weight in kilograms, measured with light clothing using a digital scale. Measured to the nearest 0.1 kg. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `weight_room_v6`                                          | weight_room_v6                                          | string   | Indicates which scale in which room that was used for weighing the participant. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `weight_garmin_v6`                                        | weight_garmin_v6                                        | number   | The participant's weight on the digital Garmin scale in the participant's home. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `bmi_v6`                                                  | bmi_v6                                                  | string   | Body Mass Index (BMI) in kg/m², calculated from weight and height. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: round(([weight_v6])/(([height_v6])^(2)), 1)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `dxa_performed_v6`                                        | dxa_performed_v6                                        | string   | Indicates if the DXA is perfomed. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `staff_initials_dxa_v6`                                   | staff_initials_dxa_v6                                   | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the DXA scan. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `dxa_upload_ldrive_v6`                                    | dxa_upload_ldrive_v6                                    | string   | DXA results saved on L-drive. Workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `dxa_upload_v6`                                           | dxa_upload_v6                                           | string   | DXA data upload. Workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `food_pref_test_v4_glasses_v6`                            | food_pref_test_v4_glasses_v6                            | string   | Indicates if the participant performed the test with or without glasses at visit 4. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: [besg_4_arm_1][food_pref_test_glasses_v4]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `food_pref_test_performed_v6`                             | food_pref_test_performed_v6                             | string   | Indicates if the participant has performed the food preference test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `food_pref_test_glasses_v6`                               | food_pref_test_glasses_v6                               | string   | Indicates if the participant has performed the test with or without glasses. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `fibro_performed_v6`                                      | fibro_performed_v6                                      | string   | FibroScan performed. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `fibro_not_performed_why_v6`                              | fibro_not_performed_why_v6                              | string   | Indicates why the fibro scan was not perfomed in case it is not. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `fibro_probe_size_v6`                                     | fibro_probe_size_v6                                     | string   | Indicates the size of the probe used for the fibro scan. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `staff_initials_fibro_v6`                                 | staff_initials_fibro_v6                                 | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the fibro scan. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `fibro_upload_ldrive_v6`                                  | fibro_upload_ldrive_v6                                  | string   | Indicates whetner or not the fibroscan is saved on the L-drive. Workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `fibro_upload_v6`                                         | fibro_upload_v6                                         | string   | Fibroscan data upload. Workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `bp_chosen_arm_v6`                                        | bp_chosen_arm_v6                                        | string   | Arm used for  blood pressure measurements. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][bp_chosen_arm_v2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `sys_bp_1_v6`                                             | sys_bp_1_v6                                             | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, first measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 10 minutes of rest. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `dia_bp_1_v6`                                             | dia_bp_1_v6                                             | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, first measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `pulse_1_v6`                                              | pulse_1_v6                                              | number   | Pulse in bpm first measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `sys_bp_2_v6`                                             | sys_bp_2_v6                                             | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, second measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `dia_bp_2_v6`                                             | dia_bp_2_v6                                             | number   | Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg, second measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `pulse_2_v6`                                              | pulse_2_v6                                              | number   | Pulse in bpm second measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `sys_bp_3_v6`                                             | sys_bp_3_v6                                             | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, third measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `dia_bp_3_v6`                                             | dia_bp_3_v6                                             | number   | Systolic blood pressure in mmHg, third measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `pulse_3_v6`                                              | pulse_3_v6                                              | number   | Pulse in bpm third measurement.  Participant sitting, measured after approximately 5-10 minutes of rest. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `sys_bp_avg_v6`                                           | sys_bp_avg_v6                                           | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of the three diastolic BP measurements. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: if( ( if([sys_bp_1_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_2_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_3_v6] <> "", 1, 0) ) > 0,  ( if([sys_bp_1_v6] <> "", [sys_bp_1_v6], 0) + if([sys_bp_2_v6] <> "", [sys_bp_2_v6], 0) + if([sys_bp_3_v6] <> "", [sys_bp_3_v6], 0) ) / ( if([sys_bp_1_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_2_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([sys_bp_3_v6] <> "", 1, 0) ),  "" ) |
| `dia_bp_avg_v6`                                           | dia_bp_avg_v6                                           | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of the three diastolic BP measurements. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: if( ( if([dia_bp_1_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_2_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_3_v6] <> "", 1, 0) ) > 0,  ( if([dia_bp_1_v6] <> "", [dia_bp_1_v6], 0) + if([dia_bp_2_v6] <> "", [dia_bp_2_v6], 0) + if([dia_bp_3_v6] <> "", [dia_bp_3_v6], 0) ) / ( if([dia_bp_1_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_2_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([dia_bp_3_v6] <> "", 1, 0) ),  "" ) |
| `pulse_avg_v6`                                            | pulse_avg_v6                                            | string   | Automatically calculated as the mean of the three pulse measurements. Bpm. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: if( ( if([pulse_1_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_2_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_3_v6] <> "", 1, 0) ) > 0,  ( if([pulse_1_v6] <> "", [pulse_1_v6], 0) + if([pulse_2_v6] <> "", [pulse_2_v6], 0) + if([pulse_3_v6] <> "", [pulse_3_v6], 0) ) / ( if([pulse_1_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_2_v6] <> "", 1, 0) + if([pulse_3_v6] <> "", 1, 0) ),  "" )               |
| `finapres_arm_cuff_size_v6`                               | finapres_arm_cuff_size_v6                               | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of arm cuff (S, M or L) at visit 2. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][finapres_arm_cuff_size_v2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `finapres_finger_cuff_size_v6`                            | finapres_finger_cuff_size_v6                            | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of finger cuff (S, M or L) at visit 2. Visit 6. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][finapres_finger_cuff_size_v2]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `finapres_minus20_v6`                                     | finapres_minus20_v6                                     | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 1, performed approximately 20 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `bloodsample_minus15_v6`                                  | bloodsample_minus15_v6                                  | string   | Record whether the participant completed bloodsample measurement 1, performed approximately 15 minutes prior to the intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `vas_minus10_v6`                                          | vas_minus10_v6                                          | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 1, performed approximately 10 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `bloodsample_minus5_v6`                                   | bloodsample_minus5_v6                                   | string   | Records whether a bloodsample was taken at time -5. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `timer_started_v6`                                        | timer_started_v6                                        | string   | Record whether the timer was started at the time of test drink consumption (defined as time 0). Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `mmtt_shake_bar_v6`                                       | mmtt_shake_bar_v6                                       | string   | Record whether the participant completed both shake and bar. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `shake_bar_time_min_v6`                                   | shake_bar_time_min_v6                                   | string   | The number of minutes it took the participant to consume the test shake and bar, if the total consumption time exceeded 10 minutes. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `mmtt_shake_v6`                                           | mmtt_shake_v6                                           | string   | The amount of the shake the participant drank. Text field. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `mmtt_bar_v6`                                             | mmtt_bar_v6                                             | string   | The amount of the bar the participant ate. Text field. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `finapres_time15_v6`                                      | finapres_time15_v6                                      | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 2, performed approximately 15 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `bloodsample_time30_v6`                                   | bloodsample_time30_v6                                   | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 30. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `vas_time30_v6`                                           | vas_time30_v6                                           | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 2, performed approximately 30 minutes into the intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `finapres_time45_v6`                                      | finapres_time45_v6                                      | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 3, performed approximately 45 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `bloodsample_time60_v6`                                   | bloodsample_time60_v6                                   | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 60. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `vas_time60_v6`                                           | vas_time60_v6                                           | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 3, performed approximately 60 minutes into the intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `finapres_time75_v6`                                      | finapres_time75_v6                                      | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 4, performed approximately 75 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `bloodsample_time90_v6`                                   | bloodsample_time90_v6                                   | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 90. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `vas_time90_v6`                                           | vas_time90_v6                                           | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 4, performed approximately 90 minutes into the intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `finapres_time105_v6`                                     | finapres_time105_v6                                     | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 5, performed approximately 105 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `bloodsample_time120_v6`                                  | bloodsample_time120_v6                                  | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 120. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `vas_time120_v6`                                          | vas_time120_v6                                          | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 5, performed approximately 120 minutes into the intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `finapres_time135_v6`                                     | finapres_time135_v6                                     | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 6, performed approximately 135 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `bloodsample_time180_v6`                                  | bloodsample_time180_v6                                  | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 180. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `vas_time180_v6`                                          | vas_time180_v6                                          | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 6, performed approximately 180 minutes into the intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `finapres_time195_v6`                                     | finapres_time195_v6                                     | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 7, performed approximately 195 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `bloodsample_time240_v6`                                  | bloodsample_time240_v6                                  | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken approximately 240 minutes into the intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `vas_time240_v6`                                          | vas_time240_v6                                          | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 7, performed approximately 240 minutes into the intervention. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `finapres_time255_v6`                                     | finapres_time255_v6                                     | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 8, performed approximately 255 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_upload_ldrive_v6`                               | finapres_upload_ldrive_v6                               | string   | Indicates whetner or not the Finapres data is saved on the L-drive. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `medicine_change_v6`                                      | medicine_change_v6                                      | string   | If there has been any changes in the participants medical record since the last visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `medicine_change_info_v6`                                 | medicine_change_info_v6                                 | string   | Confirms that the information has been entered in the instrument 'medicinændringer'. Yes/no. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `survey_answered_v6`                                      | survey_answered_v6                                      | string   | Survey answered. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `food_v6`                                                 | food_v6                                                 | string   | Food delivered. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `scipd_performed_v6`                                      | scipd_performed_v6                                      | string   | Whether the participant completed SCIP-D. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `scip_list_test_v6`                                       | scip_list_test_v6                                       | number   | Whether the participant completed the scip list test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `scip_consonant_test_v6`                                  | scip_consonant_test_v6                                  | number   | Whether the participant has completed the consonant test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `scip_word_mobilizing_v6`                                 | scip_word_mobilizing_v6                                 | number   | Whether the participant completed the word mobilizing test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `scip_delayed_recall_v6`                                  | scip_delayed_recall_v6                                  | number   | Whether the participant completed the recall test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `scip_visuomotor_v6`                                      | scip_visuomotor_v6                                      | number   | Whether the participant completed the visomotor test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `scip_upload_v6`                                          | scip_upload_v6                                          | string   | upload SCIP-D. workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `tmt_b_v6`                                                | tmt_b_v6                                                | string   | Whether the participant completed the trail making test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `tmt_v6`                                                  | tmt_v6                                                  | string   | TMT-B test time in minutes and seconds.
