Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `tmt_upload_v6`                                           | tmt_upload_v6                                           | string   | Upload TMT-B including timeframe. Workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `cognition_tests_filed_office_v6`                         | cognition_tests_filed_office_v6                         | string   | Indicates if the SCIP test and the TMT test has been filed in the briefcase in the office. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `test_protocol_previous_visit_v6`                         | test_protocol_previous_visit_v6                         | string   | Indicates what vo2 max protocol that was used at previous visit (visit 4). Visit 6. Derived using the formula: [besg_4_arm_1][vo2max_test_type_v4]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `vo2max_seat_previous_visit_v6`                           | vo2max_seat_previous_visit_v6                           | string   | The seat adjustment for the vo2 max test at the previous visit (visit 4). Visit 6. Derived using the formula: [besg_4_arm_1][vo2max_seat_v4]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `vo2max_time_length_of_previous_test_v6`                  | vo2max_time_length_of_previous_test_v6                  | string   | Indicates how long time the VO2 max test lasted at previous visit (visit 4). Visit 6. Derived using the formula: [besg_4_arm_1][vo2max_time_length_v4]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `vo2max_done_v6`                                          | vo2max_done_v6                                          | string   | Indicates whether or not the participant finished the VO2 max test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| `vo2max_test_type_v6`                                     | vo2max_test_type_v6                                     | string   | Indicates what vo2 max protocol was used at the test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `vo2max_seat_v6`                                          | vo2max_seat_v6                                          | number   | The seat adjustment for the vo2 max test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `vo2max_time_length_v6`                                   | vo2max_time_length_v6                                   | number   | Indicates how long time the VO2 max test lasted. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `vo2max_outcome_v6`                                       | vo2max_outcome_v6                                       | string   | VO2 max in ml/min. Measured using a graded exercise test on a stationary cycle ergometer with gradually increasing resistance in 1-3 minute stages, until exhaustion. During the test, oxygen uptake is continuously measured using a metabolic cart connected to a breath-by-breath gas analysis system via a face mask. Heart rate is monitored using a heart rate monitor. Visit 6.                                                                                        |
| `vo2max_upload_ldrive_v6`                                 | vo2max_upload_ldrive_v6                                 | string   | Indicates whetner or not the VO2 max test is saved on the L-drive. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `vo2max_upload_v6`                                        | vo2max_upload_v6                                        | string   | VO2max data upload. Workflow. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `homeurin_deviation_v6`                                   | homeurin_deviation_v6                                   | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during home urin sample. Deviations include delay, missed sample, wrong tube, or insufficient volume. Applies to all items in this matrix. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `stool_sample_deviation_v6`                               | stool_sample_deviation_v6                               | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during stool sample. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `sens_deviation_v6`                                       | sens_deviation_v6                                       | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during SENS monitoring. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| `spit_sample_deviation_v6`                                | spit_sample_deviation_v6                                | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during spit sample. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `urin_sample_deviation_v6`                                | urin_sample_deviation_v6                                | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during urin sample on site. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `whr_deviation_v6`                                        | whr_deviation_v6                                        | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during waist hip circumference measurement. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `dxa_deviation_v6`                                        | dxa_deviation_v6                                        | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during dxa scan. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `food_preference_deviation_v6`                            | food_preference_deviation_v6                            | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during food preference test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `fibro_deviation_v6`                                      | fibro_deviation_v6                                      | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during fibroscan. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `blood_pressure_deviation_v6`                             | blood_pressure_deviation_v6                             | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during blood pressure measurement. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `hba1c_deviation_v6`                                      | hba1c_deviation_v6                                      | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during HbA1c blood sample. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_v6`                                 | mmtt_blood_deviation_v6                                 | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during MMTT blood sample. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `finapres_deviation_v6`                                   | finapres_deviation_v6                                   | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during MMTT finapres. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `vas_deviation_v6`                                        | vas_deviation_v6                                        | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during MMTT VAS. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `medicin_deviation_v6`                                    | medicin_deviation_v6                                    | string   | Record any deviations from medication consumption. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `survey_deviation_v6`                                     | survey_deviation_v6                                     | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during surveys/questionnaires. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `cognition_deviation_v6`                                  | cognition_deviation_v6                                  | string   | Record any deviations from protocol duringthe cognition test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `vo2max_deviation_v6`                                     | vo2max_deviation_v6                                     | string   | Record any deviations from protocol during the VO2 max test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `other_deviation_v6`                                      | other_deviation_v6                                      | string   | Record any other deviations from protocol. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `homeurin_deviation_describe_v6`                          | homeurin_deviation_describe_v6                          | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the home urin collection. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `stoolsample_deviation_describe_v6`                       | stoolsample_deviation_describe_v6                       | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the stool sample. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `sens_deviation_describe_v6`                              | sens_deviation_describe_v6                              | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the SENS activity tracker. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `spitsample_deviation_describe_v6`                        | spitsample_deviation_describe_v6                        | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the spit sample. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `urin_onsite_deviation_describe_v6`                       | urin_onsite_deviation_describe_v6                       | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the urine sample on site. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `whr_deviation_describe_v6`                               | whr_deviation_describe_v6                               | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the measurements of the waist hip ratio. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `dxa_deviation_describe_v6`                               | dxa_deviation_describe_v6                               | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the DXA scan. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `food_preference_deviation_describe_v6`                   | food_preference_deviation_describe_v6                   | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the food preference test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `fibro_deviation_describe_v6`                             | fibro_deviation_describe_v6                             | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the fibro scan. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `bp_deviation_describe_v6`                                | bp_deviation_describe_v6                                | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the measurements of the blood pressure. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `hba1c_deviation_describe_v6`                             | hba1c_deviation_describe_v6                             | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the HbA1c sample. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v6`                        | mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v6                        | string   | Description of any deviations regarding blood samples during MMTT. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `finapres_deviation_describe_v6`                          | finapres_deviation_describe_v6                          | string   | Description of any deviations regarding finapres during MMTT. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `vas_deviation_describe_v6`                               | vas_deviation_describe_v6                               | string   | Description of any deviations regarding VAS. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `medicin_deviation_describe_v6`                           | medicin_deviation_describe_v6                           | string   | Description of any deviations regarding medicine. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `survey_deviation_describe_v6`                            | survey_deviation_describe_v6                            | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the surveys. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `cognition_deviation_describe_v6`                         | cognition_deviation_describe_v6                         | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the cognitive tests. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `vo2max_deviation_describe_v6`                            | vo2max_deviation_describe_v6                            | string   | Description of any deviations regarding the VO2 max test. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `other_deviation_describe_v6`                             | other_deviation_describe_v6                             | string   | Description of any other deviations from the protocol. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `comments_end_v6`                                         | comments_end_v6                                         | string   | Comment at the end of the visit. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `intervention_challenges_v6___1`                          | Udfordring i forhold til diæten.                        | boolean  | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `intervention_challenges_v6___2`                          | Udfordring i forhold til træningen.                     | boolean  | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `intervention_challenges_v6___3`                          | Andet                                                   | boolean  | Challenges with adherence to the intervention, whether diet or training. Visit 6.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |

: Fields in the `besgsdag_6` resource.
